chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P No. D- 1980 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh Case. 1. For orders on Misc. No. 7993/2026 (U/A) 2. For order on office objection No. 1 to 4. 3. For order on Misc. No. 7994/2026 (Ex/App) 4. For order on Misc. No. 7995/2026 (Stay/App) 5. For hearing of main case. 02.04.2026. Mr. Abbadul Hasnain, Advocate for the Petitioner. ********** 1. Granted. 2-5. The Petitioner has filed the instant Petition in which he has claimed to be a Trustee of Imam-e-Zamana Mission Trust. His alleged grievance seems to be that there is a separate Trust, which has been duly registered, against which the Petitioner seeks cancellation. The Petitioner has not shown any locus standi to file the instant Petition, nor has he provided any cogent reasoning for interfering with the registration of the separate Trust. Moreover, he has failed to provide any legal documentation relating to the separate Trust, which in any event seems to be a private concern, not amenable to the writ jurisdiction of this Court. Furthermore, the Petitioner has failed to show infringement for any fundamental right, and therefore the instant Petition is dismissed in limine alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE AYAZ
